source: refit on WC2018+WC2022 (de-vigged 1X2), logit/geometric blend, leave-one-tournament-out CV
note: Refit over 128 WC matches puts the optimal blend weight at w=1.0 (pure market): the model adds no 1X2 signal over the published World Cup line. This is a no-edge result, NOT a weight to deploy (w=1.0 = copy the market and pay the vig). Kept active=false and left the prior w=0.163 in place. Operational read: do not bet WC 1X2 on model edge; the model's value, if any, is in softer markets (less-watched internationals, specific totals) where it can beat a slower line. Re-run engines/worldcup/fit_market_blend.py as more odds history accrues.
